'''âg-p-y''' ('''gapaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:namefag|namefag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:namefag|namefag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-p-y
|-
! Lemma
| gapaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gapayithi|gapayithi]] || [[word:gapayiji|gapayiji]] || [[word:gapayishi|gapayishi]] || [[word:gapayi|gapayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapayuthuth|gapayuthuth]] || [[word:gapayujuj|gapayujuj]] || [[word:gapayushush|gapayushush]] || [[word:gapay|gapay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapayuthu|gapayuthu]] || [[word:gapayuju|gapayuju]] || [[word:gapayushu|gapayushu]] || [[word:gapayu|gapayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapayufuth|gapayufuth]] || [[word:gapayufuj|gapayufuj]] || [[word:gapayufush|gapayufush]] || [[word:gapayuf|gapayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gapayethe|gapayethe]] || [[word:gapayeje|gapayeje]] || [[word:gapayeshe|gapayeshe]] || [[word:gapaye|gapaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapayothoth|gapayothoth]] || [[word:gapayojoj|gapayojoj]] || [[word:gapayoshosh|gapayoshosh]] || [[word:gapay|gapay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapayotho|gapayotho]] || [[word:gapayojo|gapayojo]] || [[word:gapayosho|gapayosho]] || [[word:gapayo|gapayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapayofoth|gapayofoth]] || [[word:gapayofoj|gapayofoj]] || [[word:gapayofosh|gapayofosh]] || [[word:gapayof|gapayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gapayĂŠthĂŠ|gapayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gapayĂŠjĂŠ|gapayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gapayĂŠshĂŠ|gapayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gapayĂŠ|gapayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapayathath|gapayathath]] || [[word:gapayajaj|gapayajaj]] || [[word:gapayashash|gapayashash]] || [[word:gapay|gapay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapayatha|gapayatha]] || [[word:gapayaja|gapayaja]] || [[word:gapayasha|gapayasha]] || [[word:gapaya|gapaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapayafath|gapayafath]] || [[word:gapayafaj|gapayafaj]] || [[word:gapayafash|gapayafash]] || [[word:gapayaf|gapayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gapayasha|gapayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogapayasha|gogapayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigapayasha|gokigapayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gapaynĂŒsha|gapaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogapaynknĂŒsha|gogapaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigapaynĂŒsha|gokigapaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gapayshĂ«sha|gapayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogapaynkshĂ«sha|gogapaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigapayshĂ«sha|gokigapayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapayrosha|gapayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapaynkrosha|gogapaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapayrosha|gokigapayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gapaymusha|gapaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapaynkmusha|gogapaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapaymusha|gokigapaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gapaysherasha|gapaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogapaynksherasha|gogapaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigapaysherasha|gokigapaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gapayngasha|gapayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogapaynkngasha|gogapaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigapayngasha|gokigapayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gapayasha|gapayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogapaynkyasha|gogapaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigapayasha|gokigapayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gapayamasha|gapayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogapaynkyamasha|gogapaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigapayamasha|gokigapayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gapaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gapaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogapaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogapaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigapaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigapaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapaynĂŒrosha|gapaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapaynknĂŒrosha|gogapaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapaynĂŒrosha|gokigapaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gapaynĂŒmusha|gapaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapaynknĂŒmusha|gogapaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapaynĂŒmusha|gokigapaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gapayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gapayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogapaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogapaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigapayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigapayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapayshĂ«rosha|gapayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapaynkshĂ«rosha|gogapaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapayshĂ«rosha|gokigapayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gapayshĂ«musha|gapayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapaynkshĂ«musha|gogapaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapayshĂ«musha|gokigapayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gapayronĂŒsha|gapayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogapaynkronĂŒsha|gogapaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigapayronĂŒsha|gokigapayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gapayroshĂ«sha|gapayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogapaynkroshĂ«sha|gogapaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigapayroshĂ«sha|gokigapayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gapayromusha|gapayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogapaynkromusha|gogapaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigapayromusha|gokigapayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gapaymunĂŒsha|gapaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogapaynkmunĂŒsha|gogapaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigapaymunĂŒsha|gokigapaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gapaymushĂ«sha|gapaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogapaynkmushĂ«sha|gogapaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigapaymushĂ«sha|gokigapaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gapaymurosha|gapaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogapaynkmurosha|gogapaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigapaymurosha|gokigapaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gapay|gapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠpĂŠy|gĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogapay|hogapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠpĂŠy|hogĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogapay|hohogapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠpĂŠy|hohogĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgapay|nĂŒgapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠpĂŠy|nĂŒgĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgapay|nĂŒnĂŒgapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠpĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgapay|nĂŻgapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠpĂŠy|nĂŻgĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgapay|nĂŻnĂŻgapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠpĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugapay|lugapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠpĂŠy|lugĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugapay|lulugapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠpĂŠy|lulugĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligapay|ligapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠpĂŠy|ligĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligapay|liligapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠpĂŠy|liligĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogapay|kogapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠpĂŠy|kogĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogapay|kokogapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠpĂŠy|kokogĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegapay|kegapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠpĂŠy|kegĂŠpĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegapay|kekegapay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠpĂŠy|kekegĂŠpĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
